description: Pool created, no work submitted. Pool Lead writes initial config.json and index.json entry with pool_state: idle.
assertion: pool_state is idle; last_active_at is T0 (2026-04-25T10:00:00Z); config.json and index.json are in sync

description: First TeammateIdle event fires for code-reviewer. Hook proposes T1 > T0. Pool Lead reads T0, max(T0, T1) = T1, writes T1. Both files updated.
assertion: pool_state is still idle; last_active_at advanced to T1 (2026-04-25T10:01:15Z) > T0; max-semantics applied correctly

description: Second TeammateIdle event fires for security-reviewer 60 seconds later. Hook proposes T2 > T1. Pool Lead reads T1, max(T1, T2) = T2, writes T2. Monotonic advance confirmed.
assertion: pool_state is still idle; last_active_at advanced to T2 (2026-04-25T10:02:20Z) > T1; second idle hook fires correctly

description: Third TeammateIdle fires within 30 seconds of T2. Debounce guard detects the last write was too recent (delta < 30s) and skips the write entirely. last_active_at stays at T2.
assertion: pool_state is still idle; last_active_at is unchanged at T2 (2026-04-25T10:02:20Z) — debounce suppressed the write; value did NOT regress

description: A task is submitted. Pool Lead claims it and transitions pool_state: idle → active. last_active_at updated to T3 >= T2 using max-semantics. Both config.json and index.json written.
assertion: pool_state transitioned to active; last_active_at advanced to T3 (2026-04-25T10:05:42Z) >= T2; index.json denormalized correctly

description: Task completes. Task list empties. Pool Lead transitions pool_state: active → idle. last_active_at updated to T4 >= T3. Both config.json and index.json written.
assertion: pool_state transitioned back to idle; last_active_at advanced to T4 (2026-04-25T10:08:11Z) >= T3; pool persists after task completion

description: Task list is empty. Pool remains alive in idle state — it does NOT enter draining or stopping. Standing pools only stop on TTL expiry or explicit /stop-review-team. No new writes; last_active_at stays at T4.
assertion: pool_state is idle (NOT draining or stopping); last_active_at unchanged at T4 (2026-04-25T10:08:11Z); pool does not self-destruct on empty task list
